questions.q: Who were the four Marauders and what were their nicknames?
questions.a: Moony (Remus Lupin), Wormtail (Peter Pettigrew), Padfoot (Sirius Black), Prongs (James Potter)

questions.q: Which Horcrux was destroyed using a Basilisk fang in the Chamber of Secrets?
What is Harry Potter's school called?
questions.a: Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry

questions.q: Who was the Half-Blood Prince and what was the origin of the name?
questions.a: Severus Snape — his mother was Eileen Prince (a witch) and his father Tobias Snape was a Muggle
